cases.narrative: Indexing is represented by the activity-center beta row; status and toast mirrors cannot replace it.
Restore completion remains a durable row after the success toast expires.

cases.case_label: Package update partial result needs review
cases.narrative: The partial package update contributes to needs-review by canonical object, not by stacked failure toasts.

cases.case_label: Cancelled download keeps history and restart path
cases.narrative: Cancelled download rows stay in completed/history lanes with restart and evidence paths; no transient spinner is authoritative.

cases.case_label: Remote reconnect held by quiet hours preserves row
cases.narrative: Remote reconnect repeats collapse into one held durable row whose quiet-hours audit records the held fanout.

cases.case_label: Task queued with visible boundary reason
cases.narrative: Queued task rows name the expected execution boundary and stay inspectable without a toast.

cases.case_label: Repeated test failure coalesces into one failed row
cases.narrative: Repeated test failures share one root cause and increment the durable occurrence count rather than stacking toasts.
Debug sessions are durable job rows with evidence-only reopen rather than hidden adapter state.

cases.case_label: AI review waits on trust approval without shortcut bypass
cases.narrative: AI review rows require in-product approval; OS or companion actions can reopen but cannot approve directly.

cases.case_label: Git publish denial reopens explained revalidation
cases.denial_reason_label: Publish denied by managed policy; explicit revalidation required.
cases.narrative: Provider publish denial opens an explained revalidation path and cannot be retried from external chrome.

cases.case_label: Archived restore reopens a truthful placeholder
cases.placeholder_reason_label: Source session was archived after restore; placeholder explains retention and points at archive.
cases.narrative: Archived restore history opens a placeholder that explains retention instead of a generic home surface.

cases.case_label: Companion fanout dedupes under canonical event
cases.narrative: Companion and desktop rows share one canonical event id; dismissing desktop attention collapses companion fanout.

cases.case_label: Admin suppression preserves audit-only durable lineage
cases.narrative: Admin suppression narrows fanout while preserving durable audit and support-export lineage.

quiet_hours_audit.release_rule_label: Release as grouped digest when quiet hours end.
Bypass hold because active trust or policy scope cannot wait.
Collapse companion and desktop fanout under the canonical event id.
No external release; audit trail and in-product durable row remain.

exact_reopen_proofs.denial_reason_label: Publish denied by managed policy; explicit revalidation required.

exact_reopen_proofs.placeholder_reason_label: Source session was archived after restore; placeholder explains retention and points at archive.
